title: Raise governance decision-path coverage

sources.reason: Decision-path coverage target identified at 61% in the repository assessment.
Decision-path coverage target identified at 63% in the repository assessment.
Decision-path coverage target identified at 65% in the repository assessment.
Decision-path coverage target identified at 70% in the repository assessment.
Decision-path coverage target identified at 75% in the repository assessment.
Decision-path coverage target identified at 76% in the repository assessment.
Existing scenario coverage regression suite to extend with failure and acknowledgement branches.
Existing preflight regression suite to extend with readiness decision branches.

riskAssessment.reason: Additional tests must increase failure-path confidence without changing governance decisions.

executionDecision.reason: The target modules and coverage thresholds are explicit; implementation is limited to tests unless a coverage defect requires a minimal production correction.

preReviewWarnings: Reviewers should confirm that tests exercise existing decisions and do not weaken governance outcomes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The six targeted governance modules each reach at least 80% line coverage, or any module that cannot reach the threshold has a documented residual risk and follow-up.
New tests cover both success and failure/blocked branches for scenario coverage, agent risk, calibration, onboarding, preflight, and PR aggregation decisions.

Overall coverage remains above the repository's 80% gate, with the aspirational 85% target recorded as follow-up, and all existing tests and governance gates pass without changing production decision semantics.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The repository-wide coverage gate passes, but several high-decision-density governance modules remain between 61% and 76%, leaving failure and blocked branches under-tested.
constraints: Prioritize targeted failure, blocked, and boundary branches over low-value happy-path duplication.
Do not relax coverage thresholds or alter governance decisions to improve the metric.
Keep changes limited to the six named modules and their existing test suites.
intent.rationale: Decision-path coverage is more valuable than merely adding ordinary-path tests because these modules determine whether AI work may proceed, finish, or require human review.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: required scenario coverage failures and explicit risk acknowledgements
scenarioCoverage.reason: Add tests for missing, invalid, unverified, and acknowledged scenario states.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: agent risk gate detects missing gates and stale checkpoint evidence
scenarioCoverage.reason: Add tests for blocked and passing risk decisions.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: preflight derives ready, needs confirmation, and not ready states
scenarioCoverage.reason: Exercise readiness signal combinations and decision drivers.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: onboarding and PR aggregation preserve failure semantics
scenarioCoverage.reason: Exercise command failures, archive selection, and aggregate ownership outcomes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
